top_signals.title: The ‘Mass Affluent’ Are Losing Their Allure for Wealth Managers Navigating AI
top_signals.summary: Wealth managers keen to stay relevant in the age of artificial intelligence may soon find that clients with a mere $1 million in liquid assets are no longer worth spending human hours on.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
